---
title: "My Adventures in New York City"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cerulean
---

These are some of my favorite places in New York City, the city that never sleeps! 


### The Press Lounge Rooftop Bar

Located on 653 11th Avenue, the rooftop bar offers amazing views of the Manhattan skyline and Hudson River with a 
360 degree view! 

This is definitely one of my favorite rooftop bars in Manhattan.


#### Here's a link to the official website of the Rooftop Bar

* [The Press Lounge](https://www.thepresslounge.com/)
